text:
AOTF-s3 is the 23rd and final track on the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack, as well as the 18th and final track on disc 1 of the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack Complete Album. It was composed and arranged by .

Musical motifs

The track is a piano arrangement of XL-TT.
